title: Talks & Workshops
description: Available talks and workshops on AI governance, society, privacy, and applied technology leadership.
intro: I speak to boards, leadership teams, and technical audiences about the governance, ethical, and practical dimensions of AI adoption. Each talk is tailored to the room -- from a 20-minute keynote to a half-day workshop.

talks.title: AI Governance versus AI Enablement
talks.hook: Most organizations treat governance and enablement as opposing forces. They're not -- they're the same program.
takeaways: Why governance-first organizations adopt AI faster and with fewer incidents
A practical framework for standing up AI governance without stalling innovation
How to surface shadow AI and convert it into sanctioned, governed usage

talks.title: AI and Society
talks.hook: The decisions we make about AI in the next few years will shape institutions for decades. Most of those decisions are being made without public input.
takeaways: Where AI is already reshaping labor markets, education, and civic infrastructure
The gap between AI policy proposals and what's actually being deployed
What leaders can do now to ensure AI serves communities, not just shareholders

talks.title: Writing with AI
talks.hook: AI doesn't replace writing skill -- it reveals how much of it you actually have.
takeaways: How to use AI as an editorial partner without surrendering your voice
Prompt patterns that produce better drafts, outlines, and research briefs
When AI-assisted writing crosses from tool use into intellectual dishonesty

talks.title: Software Development with AI
talks.hook: AI coding assistants are changing how software gets built. The teams that win aren't the ones writing the most code -- they're the ones reviewing it best.
takeaways: Where AI-assisted development delivers real productivity gains versus false confidence
How to structure code review and testing practices for AI-generated code
The security and intellectual property considerations most teams are ignoring

talks.title: AI and Privacy
talks.hook: Every AI initiative is a data initiative. If your privacy posture can't keep up, your AI program is a liability.
takeaways: How AI model training and inference create novel privacy risks beyond traditional data processing
Practical controls for deploying AI within GDPR, CCPA, and emerging AI-specific regulations
Building a privacy-by-design approach that doesn't require you to say no to every AI use case

pastEngagements.title: Generative AI, Healthcare, and Governance: Opening the black box to deliver results and safety for patients
pastEngagements.description: Kicking off a day of discussion around AI disruption and governance in healthcare, attended by leaders of hospital systems and payors.

pastEngagements.title: Salesforce Project Management Success
pastEngagements.description: An interactive webinar hosted by DemandBlue, tag teaming questions with Henry Svendblad, CTO of Company Nurse.
